gh issue view 187 -> 'DEBT: Fix incomplete integration test updates for broader URL validation'
5xWhy RCA:
Why1: Integration tests inadequate because only one test was hastily patched when PR #185 changed URL validation from YouTube-only to any HTTP/HTTPS
Why2: Only one test patched because PR #185 was an emergency fix; test updates treated as secondary afterthought
Why3: Emergency fix lacked comprehensive test updates because URL validation change was not flagged as requiring coverage updates
Why4: Not flagged because tests were passing CI (green), masking that they tested the wrong behavior
Why5: Tests passed CI with wrong behavior because INVALID_NOT_YOUTUBE (a valid HTTP URL) was being accepted via a different code path after PR #185, so assertion passed coincidentally
Root cause: No test coverage for new behavioral contract (accept any HTTP/HTTPS URL) was added when behavior changed in PR #185

gh issue view 231 -> Security: 1 high severity vulnerability found in picomatch
npm audit -> picomatch <=2.3.1 || 4.0.0-4.0.3 HIGH severity (GHSA-c2c7-rcm5-vvqj ReDoS + GHSA-3v7f-55p6-f55p Method Injection)

5xWhy RCA: Why1: picomatch 2.3.1 installed (vulnerable). Why2: package-lock.json locked to 2.3.1 before patch released. Why3: no automated transitive dep update process. Why4: Dependabot/Renovate only tracks direct deps by default. Why5: No overrides/resolutions in package.json to enforce minimum patched version.
Root cause: lockfile pinned to pre-patch version; no enforcement of minimum safe transitive dep version via overrides
Fix plan: Run npm audit fix (updates picomatch 2.3.1->2.3.2 and 4.0.3->4.0.4); add overrides in package.json to prevent regression
npm audit fix -> updated picomatch 2.3.1->2.3.2 (5 instances) and 4.0.3->4.0.4 in package-lock.json
git diff package-lock.json | grep picomatch -> shows picomatch-2.3.2.tgz and picomatch-4.0.4.tgz
Added overrides.picomatch >=2.3.2 in root package.json to prevent regression
npm audit -> 1 moderate severity vulnerability (esbuild dev-only, breaking change required, out of scope)
picomatch HIGH vulnerability no longer present in npm audit output
gh run list --branch fix/issue-231-picomatch-security -> conclusion: success, status: completed

gh run view 23691517856 --log -> npm error: Cannot find module 'youtube-dl-exec/scripts/postinstall.js'
5xWhy RCA:
Why1: CI fails with 'Cannot find module youtube-dl-exec/scripts/postinstall.js' because npm ci runs the postinstall script from backend/package.json
Why2: The postinstall script runs unconditionally because backend/package.json has 'postinstall': 'node node_modules/youtube-dl-exec/scripts/postinstall.js'
Why3: This postinstall is redundant - youtube-dl-exec has its own postinstall that runs automatically
Why4: When YOUTUBE_DL_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true, youtube-dl-exec's scripts directory is not included in the installed package
Why5: CI sets YOUTUBE_DL_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true to avoid downloading the yt-dlp binary during dependency install
Root cause: Redundant postinstall script in backend/package.json that calls youtube-dl-exec's postinstall, which fails when scripts directory is absent
Removed redundant postinstall script from backend/package.json
git diff backend/package.json shows: removed 'postinstall': 'node node_modules/youtube-dl-exec/scripts/postinstall.js'
youtube-dl-exec already has its own postinstall that runs automatically - no need for explicit call

5xWhy RCA:
Why1: PR #265 blocked because missing E2E integration test for auto-thumbnail-regeneration
Why2: Only mocked unit tests added for VideoService — real-fs integration path never exercised
Why3: Unit test pattern chosen over real E2E because setup.ts globally mocks fs/promises and ffmpeggy
Why4: Global mocks prevent real ffmpeg invocation in normal test flow without explicit unmocking
Why5: drainRegenerationQueue→ThumbnailService.generateThumbnail chain was never validated end-to-end

ISSUE_313_ROOT_CAUSE_ANALYSIS.description: 5xWhy RCA for vite HIGH vulnerability GHSA-p9ff-h696-f583 in issue #313
evidence: npm audit (frontend/) -> vite HIGH GHSA-p9ff-h696-f583 + 5 MODERATE; fixAvailable requires vitest major bump
5xWhy: Root cause is vitest ^2.1.0 semver cap preventing vite from reaching patched 6.4.2; no overrides in place
Fix: upgrade vitest ^2.1.0 -> ^3.2.4, vite ^6.0.0 -> ^6.4.2, @vitest/coverage-v8 ^2.1.0 -> ^3.2.4
